mapper.select: SELECT menu_id, menu_name, menu_type, description, parent_id, menu_path, menu_order, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_id, del_dt, del_yn FROM menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
SELECT menu_id, menu_name, menu_type, description, parent_id, menu_path, menu_order, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_id, del_dt, del_yn FROM menu ORDER BY menu_type, menu_order, menu_name

SELECT menu_id, menu_name, menu_type, description, parent_id, menu_path, menu_order, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_id, del_dt, del_yn FROM menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY menu_type, menu_order, menu_name

SELECT menu_id, menu_name, menu_type, description, parent_id, menu_path, menu_order, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_id, del_dt, del_yn FROM menu WHERE parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY menu_type, menu_order, menu_name

SELECT m.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.description, m.parent_id, m.menu_path, m.menu_order, m.reg_id, m.reg_dt, m.chg_id, m.chg_dt, m.del_id, m.del_dt, m.del_yn FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY m.menu_type, m.menu_order, m.menu_name

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.description, m.parent_id, m.menu_path, m.menu_order, m.reg_id, m.reg_dt, m.chg_id, m.chg_dt, m.del_id, m.del_dt, m.del_yn FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY m.menu_type, m.menu_order, m.menu_name

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.menu_path, m.menu_order, m.del_yn, m.del_id, m.del_dt FROM menu m WHERE COALESCE(m.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM role_menu rm JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id AND COALESCE(ur.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' WHERE rm.menu_id = m.menu_id AND COALESCE(rm.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND ur.member_id = #{memberId} ) ORDER BY m.parent_id NULLS FIRST, m.menu_order, m.menu_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu ( menu_id, menu_name, menu_type, description, parent_id, menu_path, menu_order, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( COALESCE(#{menuId}, gen_random_uuid()), #{menuName}, #{menuType}, #{description}, #{parentId}, #{menuPath}, #{menuOrder}, #{regId}, COALESCE(#{regDt}, NOW()), #{chgId}, COALESCE(#{chgDt}, NOW()), #{delYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE menu SET menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_type = #{menuType}, description = #{description}, parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_path = #{menuPath}, menu_order = #{menuOrder}, chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = NOW(), del_id = #{delId}, del_dt = #{delDt}, del_yn = #{delYn} WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.select:
SELECT menu_id FROM menu WHERE menu_id IN
#{menuId}

SELECT menu_id, menu_name, menu_type, description, parent_id, menu_path, menu_order, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM menu
AND (
(menu_name = #{item.menuName} AND menu_type = #{item.menuType})
)

SELECT menu_id, menu_name, menu_type, description, parent_id, menu_path, menu_order, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM menu
AND (
(menu_name = #{item.menuName} AND menu_type = #{item.menuType} AND menu_id != #{item.menuId})
)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO menu ( menu_id, menu_name, menu_type, description, parent_id, menu_path, menu_order, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES
( #{menu.menuId}, #{menu.menuName}, #{menu.menuType}, #{menu.description}, #{menu.parentId}, #{menu.menuPath}, #{menu.menuOrder}, #{menu.regId}, #{menu.regDt}, #{menu.chgId}, #{menu.chgDt}, #{menu.delYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_id AS "menuId", m.parent_id AS "parentId", m.menu_name AS "menuName", m.menu_type AS "menuType", m.menu_path AS "menuPath", m.menu_order AS "menuOrder", m.del_yn AS "delYn", m.del_id AS "delId", m.del_dt AS "delDt" FROM menu m WHERE COALESCE(m.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM role_menu rm JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id AND COALESCE(ur.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' WHERE rm.menu_id = m.menu_id AND COALESCE(rm.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND ur.member_id = #{memberId} ) ORDER BY m.parent_id NULLS FIRST, m.menu_order, m.menu_id
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM menu WHERE menu_id IN
#{menu.menuId}
